title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-1016
summary: Firoz Khan was accused of being part of a gang led by Aman Srivastava that extorted money from coal traders using fear and hawala channels. Although booked under UAPA Sections 20/21, the court noted he was not charged under UAPA Sections 15, 16, or 17, which are prerequisites.
